sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(issued AS DATE)) AS issued_month, type AS card_type, COUNT(card_id) AS issued_cards FROM card GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2; SELECT type AS card_type, COUNT(card_id) AS issued_cards FROM card GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY issued_cards DESC; SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS trans_month, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS card_withdrawal_count FROM trans t WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(t.date AS DATE))=1997 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

charts.title: Card Issuance Volume by Month and Type

chart_spec.layout_intent: Two aligned monthly line charts stacked vertically, with card mix pie as a compact side panel.
